part.bullet1: Thrashin Road Glide Riser Adapter is designed to put Thrashin Risers on the Road Glide
part.bullet2: Riser adapter has 2 grade 8 bolts dropping down through the triple clamp to the chromoly steel bushing/nut, ensuring the highest strength and quality for maximum control and peace of mind
part.bullet3: Raises riser mounting location 2-3/8" and sets riser mounting location towards rider 1-5/8"
part.bullet4: Hardware includes 2 x 7/8" integral chromoly bushing/nut and 1-1/2" long, riser bolts
part.bullet5: Made in USA
part.bullet6: Gauge housing will require cutting.

part.bullet1: Allows riders of all riding styles to tailor the brake pedal position for added comfort
part.bullet2: Makes the brake position more comfortable by eliminating harsh ankle angles when braking
part.bullet3: Allows for 12° of rotational adjustment at the pivot point, giving the pedal position up to 1-1/2" of adjustability
part.bullet4: Arms are available in two different lengths
part.bullet5: Stock-length arms measure 8.8", recommended for riders with a longer inseam; adjustability of the brake arm angle allows pedal to move forward and down
part.bullet6: Short-length arms measure 6.8", recommended for riders who prefer the brake pedal closer and lower than stock pedal position
part.bullet7: Made in the USA

part.partDescription: Mission WP Rain Jacket - Black/Gray - Medium
part.bullet1: Heavy-duty PU coated nylon ripstop material
part.bullet2: Front center water-resistant YKK zipper has a wind cover with hook-and-loop and snap closure for extra wind protection
part.bullet3: Fully taped seams ensure weatherproof protection
part.bullet4: Drawcord hem and hook-and-loop wrist closures seal out wind
part.bullet5: Water-resistant YKK arm pit zippers allow for ventilation
part.bullet6: 3-piece hood has dual adjustments for a close fit, and stows away in collar when not needed
part.bullet7: Water-resistant YKK zipper hand pockets
part.bullet8: Lightweight, and stows away easily in a stuff pouch

part.bullet1: Heavy duty 14oz 100% cotton canvas

part.partDescription: Atlas v2 Riding Jacket - Black - Large
part.bullet1: Built with 600D high-abrasion resistant polyester and featuring high-abrasion resistant mesh liner
part.bullet2: Comes with removable interior back, elbow and impact protection pads
part.bullet3: Hook-and-loop wrist closure seals out wind
part.bullet4: Lower exterior pockets and underarm ventilation area equipped with YKK® zippers
part.bullet5: Elastic thumb loop keeps sleeves from riding up at high speeds
part.bullet6: Double shoulder design and pre-curved sleeves for comfort in riding position
part.bullet7: Embossed button snap wind cover with double pull YKK® zipper
part.bullet8: Waist fitting buttons
part.bullet9: No flap collar

part.partDescription: Highway v2 Denim Riding Jacket - Black - Large
part.bullet1: Constructed of 12 ounce black denim
part.bullet2: Durable aramid fiber lining on impact areas, such as the arms, back and shoulders
part.bullet3: Comes with removable interior back, elbow and shoulder impact protection pads
part.bullet4: Embossed button snap wind cover with double-pull YKK® zipper
part.bullet5: Adjustable sleeve cuffs, waist fitting button snaps and pre-curved sleeves for comfort in riding position
part.bullet6: Lower exterior pockets with YKK® zippers

part.partDescription: Kanan Leather/Denim Riding Vest - Black - Small
part.bullet1: Constructed from 1.3 mm - 1.4 mm Genuine Cowhide Leather and Denim
part.bullet2: YKK® front double-pull zipper and button-snap wind cover
part.bullet3: Interior back pocket for optional armor (sold separately)
part.bullet4: Quilt-lined insulated interior with custom bolt chain-stitching
part.bullet5: Minimal branding with one exterior tag
part.bullet6: Two top entry button snap exterior breast pockets
part.bullet7: Two exterior Inset YKK® zipper welt pockets
part.bullet8: Two button-snap interior pockets
part.bullet9: Includes a Thrashin Supply branded garment bag
part.bullet10: Vest is true to size. If you want to layer under it, consider sizing up.
part.bullet11: Do not machine wash or dry. Do a basic cleaning. Use a non-abrasive sponge, cold water, and a non-detergent soap. Gently scrub areas by hand and hand dry with rag.

part.bullet1: 6061 Billet Aluminum bezel

part.partDescription: Encinal Leather Shorty Riding Vest - Black - 2XL
part.bullet1: Constructed from 1.3 mm - 1.4 mm Genuine Cowhide Leather
part.bullet2: Shortened length for comfort while riding (3 inches shorter than our Mulholland Leather Vest)
part.bullet3: Less-restrictive rolled collar
part.bullet4: Quick-access concealed carry pocket on the left side
part.bullet5: YKK® front double-pull zipper and button-snap wind cover
part.bullet6: Interior back pocket for optional armor (sold separately and may need trimming to fit properly)
part.bullet7: Quilt-lined insulated interior with custom bolt chain-stitching
part.bullet8: Minimal branding with one exterior tag
part.bullet9: Two top entry button snap exterior breast pockets
part.bullet10: Two exterior inset YKK® zipper welt pockets
part.bullet11: Two button-snap Interior pockets
part.bullet12: Includes a Thrashin Supply® branded garment bag
part.bullet13: Vest is true to size. If you want to layer under it, consider sizing up.
part.bullet14: Do not machine wash or dry. Do a basic cleaning. Use a non-abrasive sponge, cold water, and a non-detergent soap. Gently scrub areas by hand and hand dry with rag.

part.bullet1: The Handlebar Bag Slim offers slim storage with the ability to expand to fit a variety of items
part.bullet2: Versatile design allows it to mount on the front or rear of risers while providing a slim profile to fit in between fairings and gas tanks
part.bullet3: 1050D nylon fabric
part.bullet5: Dimensions: 9" x 8"x 2"
part.bullet6: Front hook-and-loop pocket expands and is lined with microfiber material, great for sunglasses or electronics
part.bullet7: MOLLE webbing on front pocket
part.bullet8: Vertical and horizontal attachment points mount to risers and/or bars in multiple configurations for different size risers using hook-and-loop straps
part.bullet9: YKK zipper

part.bullet1: Keep food and beverages cold while on the road with this drop in cooler bag
part.bullet2: Works exclusively with Thrashin Expedition Saddlebags
part.bullet3: Fully insulated to regulate temperature
part.bullet4: Clean by rinsing with soapy water and wipe/hang dry
part.bullet5: Bag is not water tight; reusable freezer ice packs recommended.

part.bullet1: Top-loading opening allows for the removal of a jacket or rain gear without detaching the bag from the bike
part.bullet2: Includes two 1.5" buckle straps, six D-rings and MOLLE webbing for secure attachment
part.bullet3: Waterproof cover fits over both the bag and sissy bar for complete coverage
part.bullet4: Designed to hold everything needed for days or weeks on the road
part.bullet5: Main opening gives quick access when the bag is lying down
part.bullet6: Dirty clothes divider separates clean clothes from the worn
part.bullet7: Multiple large openings allow for easy access
part.bullet8: High-visibility interior color
part.bullet9: Additional mounting strap is available- part # 3550-0416

part.bullet1: 32 L (8.45 gallon) total storage capacity
part.bullet2: Double Zippers Expand Bag From 17" Long to 20"
part.bullet3: Made from 1680 D ballistic nylon & water resistant polyurethane fabric
part.bullet4: High vis orange 900 D Polyester interior
part.bullet5: Hidden zipper compartment for rain cover and backpack straps
part.bullet6: Four provided straps allow for wide range of mounting to any motorcycle; Can also be worn as a backpack
part.bullet7: Sewn on straps on the back of the bag for mounting to Sissybars
part.bullet8: Straps with side release buckles on the top of the bag allow for additional mounting of goods
part.bullet9: YKK zippers
part.bullet10: Additional mounting strap is available- part # 3550-0416
part.bullet11: For direct attachment to Essential Saddlebags (Part# 3501-1960) and Escape (part# 3501-1961) use Thrashin Molle Strap Kit (part# 3550-0416); For direct attachment to Expedition Saddlebags (part# 3501-1963) no strap kit needed.

part.bullet1: Perfect tank bag for holding essentials such as phones, cameras, and accessories
part.bullet2: Constructed from 1680 D ballistic nylon and PU rubber material with structure
part.bullet3: 3.5 liter capacity
part.bullet4: Magnets attach to a wide range of steel gas tanks

part.bullet6: One interior zipper pocket
part.bullet7: Elastic straps on interior base keep goods secure
part.bullet8: Included rain cover allows for cellphone visibility
part.bullet9: Supplied with clear protective stickers for mounting locations
part.bullet10: Structured lid with hook-and-loop closure

part.bullet1: Four quick-attach nylon straps for easy mounting

part.bullet3: Features YKK® zippers
part.bullet5: Can attach to handlebars with or without risers, as well as sissy bars.

part.bullet6: Front hook-and-loop pocket expands and is lined with microfiber material, great for sunglasses or electronics

part.bullet1: 18 liter combined storage capacity easily holds 14 beers on each side
part.bullet2: One-piece "L" shaped backing for increased load capacity
part.bullet3: 1680 denier ballistic nylon
part.bullet5: Waterproof rain cover included
part.bullet6: Molle attachment points
part.bullet7: YKK® zipper exterior pocket
part.bullet8: Easy-on, easy-off installation
part.bullet9: Works with most stock tail lights and blinker assemblies (verify that you have 13" between your shocks and blinkers)
part.bullet10: Fits on Dyna, Softail, and some custom bike models
part.bullet11: Maximum fender width of 12"
part.bullet12: Works with sissy bars, fixed or detachable
part.bullet13: Bag mounting brackets included which are mounted in between strut and fender
part.bullet14: Brackets come with bags (brackets do not work on '18-'22 HD FatBob)

part.bullet1: 21 liter combined storage capacity
part.bullet2: One piece "L" shaped backing and bottom structure
part.bullet3: 1680 denier ballistic nylon
part.bullet5: MOLLE attachments for universal anchoring points to secure the bag down as well as use for additional attachments
part.bullet6: Easy access lid with metal g-hooks open up to main compartment
part.bullet7: Side release buckles on top of lid allow for additional attachment
part.bullet8: Brackets which mount between strut and fender included
part.bullet9: Interior mesh pocket on top of lid and back of the bag
part.bullet10: Comes with internal stuff sacks
part.bullet11: YKK® zippers
part.bullet12: Easy on, easy off Installation with throw over design
part.bullet13: Compatible with fixed or detached sissy bars
part.bullet14: Fits fenders with the maximum width of 12”.
part.bullet15: Works with most stock tail light and blinker assemblies that must have a minimum of 15" between shocks and blinkers.
part.bullet16: May have to relocate blinkers for other models.

part.bullet1: Saddlebags with a clean, minimalist look and durable materials

part.bullet6: MOLLE attachment points on lid
part.bullet7: Pair with the Strap Kit & Passenger Bag (sold separately)
part.bullet8: Easy-on, easy off installation
part.bullet9: Maximum fender width of 12”
part.bullet10: Bag mounting brackets included, which are mounted in between strut and fender
part.bullet11: Fits on a wide variety of motorcycles.
part.bullet12: Works with most stock tail lights and blinker assemblies.
part.bullet13: Works with sissybar/backrest, fixed or detachable.
part.bullet14: The brackets that come with the bags do not work on '18-'22 Harley FatBob.

part.bullet1: 10 liter combined storage capacity
part.bullet2: One-piece "L" shaped backing for increased load capacity
part.bullet3: Made of 1680D Denier Ballistic Nylon
part.bullet5: MOLLE Attachments for Universal anchoring points to secure the bag down, as well as, use for additional attachments
part.bullet6: YKK® Zipper exterior pocket
part.bullet7: Adjustable yoke
part.bullet8: Hi-Viz orange interior to improve interior visibility
part.bullet9: Maximum Funder/Strut width of 12"
part.bullet10: Works with Sissy Bar, fixed or detachable
part.bullet11: Bag mounting brackets included which are mounted in between strut & fender
part.bullet12: Works with most stock tail light and blinker assembly (Verify a minimum of 13" between bike's shocks and blinkers)

part.productName: Hard Mount Brackets for Essential & Escape Saddlebags
part.bullet1: Ability to raise and lower the height of the bracket by 1/2" up and down
part.bullet2: Hardware and spacers for a variety of models
part.bullet3: Black powder-coated mild steel
part.bullet4: Comes with left & right specific brackets
part.bullet5: Easy Installation
part.bullet6: Will work with other models such as Sportster, FXR, and custom applications but will need different hardware and spacers. Blinkers may also need to be relocated.
part.bullet7: Will work with both hard mount and detachable sissy bars; may require additional hardware to pair with your docking hardware.

part.bullet1: Made of 1680 D ballistic nylon
part.bullet2: High visibility orange interior
part.bullet3: Universal Molle webbing attachment

part.bullet1: Can attach to handlebars with or without risers, as well as sissy bars
part.bullet2: Four quick-attach nylon straps for easy mounting
part.bullet3: Constructed from 1680D ballistic nylon
part.bullet4: Measures 9” L x 4” W x 5” T
part.bullet5: Features YKK® zippers
part.bullet6: Four interior pockets

part.bullet1: Slim storage with the ability to expand to fit a variety of items
part.bullet2: Versatile design allows it to mount on the front or rear of risers while providing a slim profile to fit in between fairings and gas tanks
part.bullet3: 1680D denier ballistic nylon
part.bullet5: 9" (22.86 cm) x 8" (20.32 cm) x 2" (50.8 mm) with front hook-and-loop expandable pocket lined with microfiber material, great for sunglasses or electronics
part.bullet6: MOLLE webbing on front pocket
part.bullet7: Vertical and horizontal attachment points mount to risers and/or bars in multiple configurations fo rdifferent size risers using straps
part.bullet8: YKK zipper

part.bullet1: Built with 600D high-abrasion resistant polyester and featuring high-abrasion resistant mesh liner
part.bullet2: Comes with removable interior back, elbow and impact protection pads
part.bullet3: Hook-and-loop wrist closure seals out wind
part.bullet4: Lower exterior pockets and underarm ventilation area equipped with YKK® zippers
part.bullet5: Elastic thumb loop keeps sleeves from riding up at high speeds
part.bullet6: Double shoulder design and pre-curved sleeves for comfort in riding position
part.bullet7: Embossed button snap wind cover with double pull YKK® zipper
part.bullet8: Waist fitting buttons
part.bullet9: No flap collar
